description_long: This is a large, rectangular, vintage-style metal toolbox with a weathered red finish and visible signs of wear and rust. The front prominently displays a large white Coca-Cola logo, giving it a retro, branded appearance. The lid is split into two hinged sections, each with a sturdy, metal folding handle for lifting. On both short sides, there are robust, rectangular metal handles for carrying, and a small triangular warning sticker is visible on the front right. The surface is rough and matte, with patches of exposed metal and chipped paint, suggesting heavy use. The box sits on small feet, slightly elevating it from the ground, and the overall construction appears solid and industrial.
description: A large, weathered red metal toolbox with a prominent Coca-Cola logo, folding handles, and visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo, split lid, and a small triangular warning sticker on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a rectangular metal handle and the worn, textured red surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with no markings or handles, just the distressed red metal surface.
description_view_3: Right side view with a matching rectangular metal handle and visible wear.
attribute_handle_type: Two folding rectangular steel handles on the lid and one fixed rectangular steel handle on each short side; all are robust and utilitarian, designed for heavy lifting.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Central steel clasp latch on the front, suitable for padlocking; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large white Coca-Cola script logo is visible on the front face, centered and spanning most of the width.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The toolbox appears to have a single large internal compartment, as implied by the split lid; no trays, drawers, or dividers are visible.
attribute_external_labeling: Small triangular warning sticker on the front right
